## What does this PR add or change?

<!-- One or two sentences describing your contribution. -->

## Type of contribution

<!-- Check one with an "x" -->

- [ ] New article
- [ ] New case study
- [ ] New top-level topic (discussed in an issue first, includes folder README + first article)
- [ ] Improvement to existing content (fix, clarification, update)
- [ ] Repository / docs improvement

## Checklist

- [ ] I read `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] My article is based on a template from `templates/` and includes the metadata header (Topic, Level, Author)
- [ ] The file uses kebab-case naming and lives in the most relevant folder
- [ ] I added a link to my article in the folder's `README.md` index
- [ ] This is original content (not copied from another source)
- [ ] Content is practical and non-promotional
